══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Reborn — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Reborn — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Reborn — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 24 damage. Reborn — Winged Striker HP: 43/67
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Reborn — Winged Striker HP: 26/67
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Reborn — Winged Striker HP: 5/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Reborn — Winged Striker --- HP: 5/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (5/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Reborn — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Reborn — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Reborn — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Reborn — Winged Striker HP: -16/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
